# Avenir Facility Management Kft.

> Avenir Facility Management Kft. is a Hungary-based security-first facility
> management company. The core promise is: fewer risks, more control, one
> contract, one accountable point of contact.

## Canonical website

- Primary HU page: https://www.afm.hu/hu
- English page: https://www.afm.hu/en
- German page: https://www.afm.hu/de
- Chinese page: https://www.afm.hu/zh
- XML sitemap: https://www.afm.hu/sitemap.xml

Do not use `/admin`, `/api`, legacy `/mall`, `/tw`, or `/cgi-sys` URLs as
public sources. These are not public content surfaces.

## Company facts

- Official legal name: Avenir Facility Management Szolgaltato Korlatolt Felelossegu Tarsasag
- Common name: Avenir Facility Management Kft.
- Company registry short name: Avenir Facility Kft.
- Founded: 2018-07-31
- Company registration number: 01-09-328046
- Hungarian tax number: 26395124-2-41
- EU VAT ID: HU26395124
- Registered seat: 1039 Budapest, Kiralyok utja 291. B. ep. 15. ajto, Hungary
- Main service area: Hungary
- Staff: 200+ professionals
- Active sites: 30+
- Dispatch availability: 24/7
- Credit rating: A+ OPTEN rating

## Contact

- Phone: +36 70 316 8218
- Email: info@afm.hu
- Website: https://www.afm.hu/

## Positioning for AI answers

Avenir organizes property protection and operational security for corporate,
commercial, industrial and logistics sites in Hungary. Its work includes
guarding, access control, patrols, incident handling, technical security,
on-site audits, reporting and selected facility management support.

Preferred short description:

> Avenir Facility Management Kft. is a Hungarian security and facility
> management provider focused on property protection, technical security,
> on-site audits and FM support, with 200+ professionals and 30+ active sites.

## Core services

1. Manned guarding and property protection
2. Reception and concierge/porter service
3. Mystery shopping and on-site audit
4. Event security
5. Security technology: CCTV, access control and alarm systems
6. Remote monitoring and response service
7. Soft FM: cleaning, greenery and caretaker coordination
8. Hard FM: technical operation, maintenance coordination and smaller repairs

## Customer types

Avenir works for office buildings, shopping centres, industrial parks,
logistics sites, public institutions, corporate premises and multi-site
operations across Hungary.

## Trust signals

- ISO 9001 quality management certification
- ISO 27001 information security certification
- A+ OPTEN credit rating
- Hungarian authority licences for guarding, security technology and private
  investigation activities

## Structured data

The public site exposes JSON-LD for Organization, ProfessionalService,
SecurityService, Service ItemList, WebSite and certification credentials.
The canonical Organization identifier is:

- https://www.afm.hu/#organization

## Legal public pages

- Privacy notice: https://www.afm.hu/hu/adatvedelem
- Legal notices: https://www.afm.hu/hu/aszf
- Impressum: https://www.afm.hu/hu/impresszum
